# ANDE Precision Bearing Technology Co., Ltd.

> ISO 9001:2015 certified bearing manufacturer since 2019, based in Jiangyin, Jiangsu, China. We manufacture precision ball bearings, roller bearings, linear motion systems, and mounted bearing units for steel mills, mining, energy, automotive, and general manufacturing industries. Factory direct supply to distributors and OEM buyers in 50+ countries.

## Company Overview

- Annual production capacity: 5,000,000+ bearing units
- Facility size: 15,000+ m² with CNC grinding, superfinishing, and automated assembly
- Precision classes: P0 (ABEC 1), P6, P5, P4
- Export experience: 30+ years, 50+ countries
- Certifications: ISO 9001:2015, products conform to ISO, JIS, ABEC, DIN standards

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.andebearing.com/): Company overview, factory capabilities, quality highlights, and featured product categories
- [Products](https://www.andebearing.com/products): Full catalog of precision bearings — ball bearings, roller bearings, linear motion, mounted units, and accessories
- [Ball Bearings](https://www.andebearing.com/products/ball-bearings): Deep groove ball bearings for high-speed applications, electric motors, pumps, and conveyors
- [Roller Bearings](https://www.andebearing.com/products/roller-bearings): Tapered and spherical roller bearings for heavy radial/axial loads in steel mills, mining, and gearboxes
- [Linear Motion](https://www.andebearing.com/products/linear-motion): Linear guide systems for CNC machines, automation, and precision instrumentation
- [Mounted Units](https://www.andebearing.com/products/mounted-units): Pillow block and flange mounted bearing units for conveyors, agriculture, and HVAC
- [Accessories](https://www.andebearing.com/products/accessories): Bearing housings, lubricants, seals, and maintenance tools
- [Deep Groove Ball Bearing](https://www.andebearing.com/products/deep-groove-ball-bearing): Bore 10–200mm, chrome steel AISI 52100, up to 17,000 RPM, ISO 15:2017
- [Tapered Roller Bearing](https://www.andebearing.com/products/tapered-roller-bearing): Bore 15–300mm, dynamic load up to 1,700 kN, ISO 355
- [Spherical Roller Bearing](https://www.andebearing.com/products/spherical-roller-bearing): Self-aligning up to 2°, bore 20–400mm, dynamic load up to 2,500 kN
- [Linear Guide System](https://www.andebearing.com/products/linear-guide): Rail widths 15–65mm, speed up to 5 m/s, multiple precision grades
- [Mounted Bearing Unit](https://www.andebearing.com/products/mounted-bearing-unit): Shaft 12–140mm, pre-assembled with triple-lip seals, ISO 3228
- [Bearing Housing](https://www.andebearing.com/products/bearing-housing): Cast iron GG25/GGG40, shaft 20–160mm, ISO 113
- [Bearing Lubricant](https://www.andebearing.com/products/bearing-lubricant): Synthetic grease, lithium complex, NLGI Grade 2, up to 180°C
- [Industries](https://www.andebearing.com/industries): Industries served — steel & rolling mills, mining, energy, automotive, manufacturing, agriculture
- [Services](https://www.andebearing.com/services): Technical consultation, bearing selection, installation support, failure analysis, and maintenance programs
- [Quality](https://www.andebearing.com/quality): Quality assurance process, certifications, and inspection equipment details
- [About](https://www.andebearing.com/about): Company history (founded 2019), mission, factory capabilities, and global reach
- [FAQ](https://www.andebearing.com/faq): MOQ, lead times, OEM/ODM services, payment terms, sample policy, export packaging
- [Contact / RFQ](https://www.andebearing.com/contact): Request a quote, send inquiry, contact information, response within 24 hours

## Contact

- Email: andeprecisionbearing@gmail.com

- Address: No. 23 Lianxin Road, Huashi Industrial Park, Jiangyin, Jiangsu, China

## Product Specifications Summary

### Deep Groove Ball Bearings
Bore: 10–200mm | OD: 30–340mm | Material: AISI 52100 / AISI 440C | Speed: up to 17,000 RPM | Dynamic load: 1.5–380 kN | Seal: Open / ZZ / 2RS | Standard: ISO 15:2017

### Tapered Roller Bearings
Bore: 15–300mm | OD: 35–540mm | Material: Case-hardened / through-hardened steel | Speed: up to 5,000 RPM | Dynamic load: 14–1,700 kN | Configurations: single, double, four-row | Standard: ISO 355

### Spherical Roller Bearings
Bore: 20–400mm | OD: 47–650mm | Self-aligning: up to 2° | Speed: up to 3,800 RPM | Dynamic load: 25–2,500 kN | Standard: ISO 15:2017

### Linear Guide Systems
Rail width: 15–65mm | Speed: up to 5 m/s | Dynamic load: 4.6–224.7 kN per block | Grades: Normal / High / Precision / Super-Precision

### Mounted Bearing Units
Shaft: 12–140mm | Dynamic load: 4.5–370 kN | Locking: set screw / eccentric collar / adapter | Seals: triple-lip | Standard: ISO 3228

## Industries Served

- **Steel & Rolling Mills**: Spherical roller bearings (22200–24100 series), tapered roller bearings for continuous casters, hot strip mills, cold rolling mills
- **Mining & Minerals**: Heavy-duty bearings for crushers, conveyors, vibrating screens with enhanced sealing for dust and moisture
- **Energy & Power**: Wind turbine main shaft bearings, generator bearings, pump and compressor bearings
- **Automotive & Transport**: Precision tapered roller bearings for wheel hubs, deep groove ball bearings for alternators and water pumps
- **General Manufacturing**: Full range for machine tools, conveyors, packaging equipment, CNC spindles
- **Agriculture & Forestry**: Mounted units and sealed bearings for tractors, harvesters, and grain handling in harsh conditions
